login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Enter your details to continue to CareerLens.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Complete the three short steps below to set up your profile.
signup.consent: I consent to CareerLens collecting, storing, and processing data related to my account, and I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

forgot.title: Recover your password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we’ll prepare the reset flow.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.description: Choose and confirm the password you want to use next.

superadmin.title: Operations access
superadmin.description: This restricted sign-in requires the built-in credentials and a current authentication code.

actions.checkFields: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
actions.serviceUnavailable: Authentication is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
actions.signupRateLimit: Too many signup attempts. Please try again later.
actions.accountCreationFailed: Could not create an account with those details.
actions.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists. Log in or use a different email.
actions.accountCreatedLoginUnavailable: Your account was created, but automatic sign-in is unavailable. Try logging in again shortly.
actions.loginRateLimit: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
actions.tooManyAttemptsRestart: Too many attempts. Start the sign-in process again later.
actions.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
actions.recoverySent: If that account exists, password reset instructions have been sent.
actions.resetRateLimit: Too many reset attempts. Please try again later.
actions.invalidResetLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
actions.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.dataConsent: You must consent to data collection and processing to create an account.
validation.passwordMax: Password must be at most 128 characters.
validation.birthDayInvalid: Enter a valid day of birth.
validation.birthDateInvalid: Enter a valid date of birth.
validation.birthDateFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future.

StartingPoint.title: Starting Point
StartingPoint.description: Bring together your personality result, education, experience, and key milestones to understand where you are today.

Profile.title: Personal information
Profile.description: Keep your details current so CareerLens can personalize your experience.
Profile.summary: These details identify your account and help tailor your experience to you.

personality.emptyDescription: Answer 12 short questions to identify patterns in how you think, decide, and act.
personality.completedDescription: Review your latest result or retake the test whenever you want a fresh perspective.

form.title: Profile details
form.fullNameHint: The name shown across your account.
form.emailHint: This is also the email you use to sign in.
form.dateOfBirthHint: Enter your complete date of birth.

extended.title: Education and experience
extended.description: Add meaningful milestones so your profile reflects your capabilities and journey.

education.title: Education
education.description: Ordered from high school through graduate study.
education.dialogDescription: Record your school, study period, and transcript in the format for that level.
education.fieldOfStudyHint: For example: Computer Science, advanced Mathematics, or MBA.

fieldHints.HIGH_SCHOOL: For example: advanced Mathematics or Natural Sciences.
fieldHints.UNDERGRADUATE: For example: Computer Science or International Economics.
fieldHints.GRADUATE: For example: MSc in Artificial Intelligence or PhD in Economics.

education.optionalOnEdit: A .xlsx file up to 2 MB. Leave empty to keep the saved transcript.
education.highSchoolTranscriptHint: Upload one .xlsx file per grade with 2 columns: Subject and Year average. The system calculates the average on a 10-point scale.
education.higherEducationTranscriptHint: Upload a .xlsx file up to 2 MB with 3 columns: Subject, Credits, and Score. The system calculates the credit-weighted cumulative average.
education.scoreScaleHint: Choose the scale used in the Excel file.
education.researchHint: Available for university and graduate study only. Enter both a title and description when adding research.

certificate.title: Certificates
certificate.dialogDescription: Enter the certificate name, issue year, and upload supporting evidence.
certificate.name: Certificate name
certificate.evidenceHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, or WebP, up to 5 MB.
certificate.replaceEvidenceHint: Choose a new file only if you want to replace the current evidence.

work.title: Work experience
work.description: Most recent roles appear first, with learnings and skills gained.
work.dialogDescription: Describe the workplace, period, and value you gained.
work.skillsHint: For example: project management, communication, data analysis.

competition.title: Competitions and achievements
competition.description: Competitions you joined, with recent years first.
competition.dialogDescription: Record the competition, any award, and participation year.
competition.name: Competition name
competition.awardHint: Leave blank if you participated without an award.

activity.title: Other activities
activity.description: Extracurricular, community, volunteer, or personal projects.
activity.dialogDescription: Enter the activity or project you want to record.
activity.name: Activity name

actions.checkFields: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
actions.failed: We could not save this information. Please try again.
actions.deleteFailed: We could not delete this information. Please try again.
actions.notFound: The information was not found or you cannot edit it.
actions.unavailable: This account has no editable profile.

validation.fieldOfStudy: The field or concentration is too long.
validation.researchTitle: The research title is too long.
validation.researchDescription: The research description is too long.
validation.research: Enter both the research title and description.
validation.name: Enter a valid name.
validation.awardName: The award name is too long.
validation.position: The position or role is too long.
validation.endDateRequired: Enter both an end month and year, or mark this as your current role.
validation.endDateBeforeStart: The end date cannot be before the start date.

transcriptFile.fileTooLarge: The transcript file must be 2 MB or smaller.
transcriptFile.missingHeaders: The Excel file is missing required column headers.
transcriptFile.empty: The Excel file has no subject data.
transcriptFile.tooManyRows: A transcript can contain at most 200 subjects.
transcriptFile.invalidRow: Data on row {row} is invalid or outside the selected score scale.
transcriptFile.duplicateSubject: The subject on row {row} is duplicated.
transcriptFile.reimportRequired: Re-import the cumulative transcript when changing the score scale.

evidence.tooLarge: The supporting file must be 5 MB or smaller.
evidence.invalidType: Only PDF, JPG, PNG, or WebP files are accepted.
evidence.invalidContent: The file content does not match its declared format.

validation.fullName: Enter a full name with at least 2 characters.
validation.birthDate: Enter a valid date of birth that is not in the future.
validation.birthDay: Enter a valid day of birth.
validation.birthYear: Enter a birth year between 1900 and the current year.

actions.saved: Your personal information has been saved.
actions.checkFields: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
actions.emailInUse: This email is already used by another account.
actions.failed: We could not save your changes. Please try again.
actions.unavailable: This account does not have a personal profile to edit.

PersonalityTest.title: Personality test
PersonalityTest.description: Explore how you recharge, take in information, make decisions, and organize daily life.

intro.title: Understand yourself through 12 questions
intro.description: Choose the option that sounds most like you in everyday situations. There are no right or wrong answers.
intro.timeDescription: A short test focused on familiar choices from daily life.
intro.answerDescription: Choose what you usually do, not what you think you should do.
intro.note: Your result reflects current preferences and does not replace a professional psychological assessment.

question.guidance: Choose the option that is closer to you.

result.title: Your result is ready
result.description: These four letters summarize the preferences shown in your answers.
result.noteTitle: Use this result as a starting point
result.note: Personality can shift across contexts and experiences. You can retake the test when the result no longer feels right.

E.title: Extraversion
E.description: You often recharge through interaction and like to develop ideas by talking with others.

I.title: Introversion
I.description: You often recharge in private and prefer to reflect before sharing your thoughts.

S.title: Sensing
S.description: You notice concrete facts, direct experience, and information you can apply right away.

N.title: Intuition
N.description: You readily notice patterns, future possibilities, and meaning behind information.

T.title: Thinking
T.description: You often prioritize consistency, evidence, and principles when making decisions.

F.title: Feeling
F.description: You often consider personal values, individual needs, and the human impact of decisions.

J.title: Judging
J.description: You feel more comfortable with plans, clear milestones, and work completed on schedule.

P.title: Perceiving
P.description: You prefer to keep options open, explore as you go, and adjust to the situation.

0.prompt: After a busy week, what helps you recharge more?
0.a: Meeting friends or joining an activity with plenty of people
0.b: Spending quiet time alone or with a few people close to me

1.prompt: When you enter a completely new group, what do you usually do?
1.a: Start conversations and get to know several people
1.b: Observe first, then connect with a few people who feel right

2.prompt: When an idea is still taking shape, how do you prefer to work through it?
2.a: Talk it through with others until it becomes clearer
2.b: Think it through privately before sharing it

3.prompt: When learning a new subject, which starting point helps you more?
3.a: Seeing a concrete example and trying it step by step
3.b: Understanding the big picture and possible directions first

4.prompt: Which kind of information do you tend to trust more?
4.a: Clear facts and details that can be verified
4.b: Patterns and meaning that emerge across several sources

5.prompt: How would you rather receive instructions for a new task?
5.a: With a clear process and specific criteria to follow
5.b: With an overall goal and room to discover my own approach

6.prompt: When making a difficult decision, what do you usually prioritize?
6.a: The choice that best fits the evidence and consistent principles
6.b: The choice that best fits my values and its effect on people

7.prompt: When giving feedback to someone who is struggling, what do you do first?
7.a: Analyze the issue and state a practical solution directly
7.b: Listen to their feelings and phrase feedback with care

8.prompt: During a disagreement, what matters more to you?
8.a: Finding a fair solution based on the same standard for everyone
8.b: Preserving the relationship and considering individual needs

9.prompt: When starting a long project, which approach feels more natural?
9.a: Plan the work, set milestones, and track progress
9.b: Begin, explore, and adjust the plan as I learn

10.prompt: What kind of preparation makes a trip feel more comfortable?
10.a: A schedule with the main choices settled in advance
10.b: A few anchor points with freedom to change plans

11.prompt: When an important deadline is approaching, which rhythm sounds more like you?
11.a: Create structure early and complete each part according to plan
11.b: Stay flexible and accelerate once I have enough information

actions.saved: Your result has been saved to your profile.
actions.failed: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.
actions.unavailable: This account cannot save a personality test result.
